items.title_zh: 中国 Nexchip 半导体公司表示，其计划通过以每股 4.12 美元左右的价格发行 2.162 亿股股票，在香港发行股票，筹集约 8.9037 亿美元，这是其发行范围的上限（Rajasik Mukherjee/路透社）

items.title_original: Apple says it reached a $30B+ deal with Broadcom to produce 15B chips on US soil in the next five years, its largest pledge as part of its $600B US investments (Rolfe Winkler/Wall Street Journal)

items.title_zh: 苹果表示，它与博通达成了一项价值超过 30B 美元的协议，将在未来五年内在美国本土生产 15B 芯片，这是其在 600B 美元美国投资中最大的承诺（Rolfe Winkler/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 苹果表示，它与博通达成了一项价值超过 30B 美元的协议，将在未来五年内在美国本土生产 15B 芯片，这是其在 600B 美元美国投资中最大的承诺（Rolfe Winkler/华尔街日报） / Apple says it reached a $30B+ deal with Broadcom to produce 15B chips on US soil in the next five years, its largest pledge as part of its $600B US investments (Rolfe Winkler/Wall Street Journal)

items.title: China's CNVD says it found "security backdoor vulnerabilities" in Claude Code that "send sensitive information" like "location and identity to remote servers" (Raffaele Huang/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: China's CNVD says it found "security backdoor vulnerabilities" in Claude Code that "send sensitive information" like "location and identity to remote servers" (Raffaele Huang/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: China's CNVD says it found "security backdoor vulnerabilities" in Claude Code that "send sensitive information" like "location and identity to remote servers" (Raffaele Huang/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 中国 CNVD 表示，它在 Claude Code 中发现了“安全后门漏洞”，可以“向远程服务器发送位置和身份等敏感信息”（Raffaele Huang/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 中国 CNVD 表示，它在 Claude Code 中发现了“安全后门漏洞”，可以“向远程服务器发送位置和身份等敏感信息”（Raffaele Huang/华尔街日报） / China's CNVD says it found "security backdoor vulnerabilities" in Claude Code that "send sensitive information" like "location and identity to remote servers" (Raffaele Huang/Wall Street Journal)
